channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: Helping developers build safer AI experiences for teens
item.description: Technical Analysis: Enhancing Teen Safety in AI Experiences The increasing presence of AI in the lives of teenagers has sparked concerns about their online safety and well-being. To address this,...

item.title: 90% of Claude Code Output Goes to Repos Nobody Stars. That's the Wrong Problem.
item.description: 90% of Claude Code output goes to repos with less than 2 stars. A dashboard called claudescode.dev published the data this week and Hacker News lost its mind. The stat sounds damning. All that AI...

item.title: I built an AI speaking partner because language apps kept teaching me to pass tests, not talk
item.description: I built an AI speaking partner because language apps kept teaching me to pass tests, not talk So here's the thing. I've been "learning" English for 15 years. Fifteen. Years. I can read technical...

item.title: How to Avoid Getting Blocked While Scraping in 2026 (Complete Guide)
item.description: Every web scraper eventually hits the wall: your requests start returning 403s, CAPTCHAs appear on every page, or your IP gets blacklisted entirely. In 2026, anti-bot systems are more...

item.title: The least surprising chapter of the Manus story is what’s happening right now
item.description: Did anyone think there would not be a reckoning over this tie-up?

item.title: Build with TRAE @ São Paulo: Muito além do demo, veja como os devs dominam o TRAE SOLO
item.description: No dia 22 de março, o Infinity Tower — icônico escritório da ByteDance em São Paulo — abriu suas portas para um grupo especial de "geeks": os pioneiros do Build with TRAE @ São Paulo. A missão?...

item.title: I built a lightweight OpenTelemetry viewer for local development
item.description: The problem Every time I wanted to test OpenTelemetry instrumentation locally, I had to spin up Jaeger or a full collector stack. docker-compose up, wait, configure exporters, hope nothing clashes...

item.title: I built 10 autonomous AI agents for Claude Code — here's how they work Tags: ai, webdev, productivity, opensource
item.description: Most developers use Claude Code at maybe 20% of its potential. They type "fix this bug" and expect magic. When the output is mediocre, they blame the tool. The problem is not the tool. It is the...

item.title: What If Your AI Ran Inside an OS Designed for It?
item.description: We build operating systems for processes. We build containers for microservices. We build sandboxes for untrusted code. But we deliver AI agents — systems that can reason, plan, use tools, and...

item.title: Generate database documentation with SchemaSpy & Docker (Windows, Linux, macOS)
item.description: Introduction SchemaSpy is a tool that allows you to generate interactive HTML documentation from databases. In this guide, I will use Oracle as an example, but you can also use SchemaSpy with...

item.title: ProxyPool Hub: Use Claude Code, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI for Free with Multi-Account Pooling
item.description: What is ProxyPool Hub? ProxyPool Hub is an open-source, multi-protocol AI API proxy server that lets you pool multiple free accounts to use popular AI coding assistants — without paying for API...

item.title: Intel and LG Display may have beaten Apple and Qualcomm with the best laptop battery life ever
item.description: One of the coolest laptops we saw at CES in January was the new Dell XPS 16, with a unique 1-120Hz variable refresh rate display that can sip power when you don't need the screen to stay speedy....

item.title: Mercor competitor Deccan AI raises $25M, sources experts from India
item.description: Deccan AI concentrates its workforce in India to manage quality in a fast-growing but fragmented AI training market.

item.title: The Sonos Ace are a hefty 25 percent for Amazon’s Big Spring Sale
item.description: Amazon’s third annual Big Spring Sale might be a great opportunity to pick up a color ebook reader or an RGB-equipped table lamp, but the pickings are slimmer when it comes to noise-canceling...

item.title: The best deals we’ve found from Amazon’s Big Spring Sale (so far)
item.description: Amazon loves to manufacture an event. March is historically a dry spell for deals; however, with Amazon’s third annual Big Spring Sale, which starts today and runs through March 31st, the retail...

item.title: The AI skills gap is here, says AI company, and power users are pulling ahead
item.description: Anthropic finds AI isn’t replacing jobs yet, but early data shows growing inequality as experienced users gain an edge, raising concerns about future displacement and workforce divides.

item.title: The portable Fanttik X9 Pro tire inflator is down to its best price in months
item.description: If you’ve ever had to deal with a flat tire, you know how quickly it can derail your day. That’s why it’s worth considering a portable inflator like the Fanttik X9 Pro. The small, rechargeable air...

item.title: Meta is laying off hundreds of employees as it pours money into AI
item.description: Meta is laying off hundreds of employees across its company, according to reports from The New York Times, NBC News, and The Information. The job cuts impact workers on Meta's recruiting, social...

item.title: Spotify is letting artists manually approve releases to combat AI fakes
item.description: Spotify is beta-testing a new feature called Artist Profile Protection that lets artists review releases before they go live. Sometimes songs end up on the wrong artist pages because of metadata...

item.title: Google unveils TurboQuant, a new AI memory compression algorithm — and yes, the internet is calling it ‘Pied Piper’
item.description: Google’s TurboQuant has the internet joking about Pied Piper from HBO's "Silicon Valley." The compression algorithm promises to shrink AI’s “working memory” by up to 6x, but it’s still just a lab...

item.title: Razer’s new Blade 16 gaming laptop has an Intel Panther Lake chip and very fast RAM
item.description: Razer is giving its Blade 16 gaming laptop a speed and battery boost for 2026. The high-end gaming laptop keeps the same thin chassis and RTX 50-series GPU options as last year's model, but it's...

item.title: The surprise hit Nex Playground is the latest console to get a price hike
item.description: Everything about video games is getting more expensive, and soon that will include a budget-friendly console. The Nex Playground - a Kinect-like device aimed at families that made headlines by...

item.title: Disney’s big bets on the metaverse and AI slop aren’t going so well
item.description: Less than a week into his tenure as Disney's newly-appointed CEO, Josh D'Amaro is already dealing with two separate crises that have cast a shadow over the company's future plans. OpenAI is...

item.title: Woot is offering over 20 percent off Switch 2 controllers and games today
item.description: Woot is running a day-long sale coinciding with the start of Amazon’s Big Spring Sale. Many products across multiple tech categories are discounted, including dozens of video games and...

item.title: Melania Trump wants a robot to homeschool your child
item.description: The first lady sees AI and robotics playing a prominent role in the future of American education.

item.title: There’s Something Very Dark About a Lot of Those Viral AI Fruit Videos
item.description: With female AI fruit being fart-shamed and even sexually assaulted, there’s a misogynistic undercurrent to the fruit slop microdramas, even as they appear to be cultivating genuine fans.

item.title: OpenClaw Agents Can Be Guilt-Tripped Into Self-Sabotage
item.description: In a controlled experiment, OpenClaw agents proved prone to panic and vulnerable to manipulation. They even disabled their own functionality when gaslit by humans.

item.title: LeakBase Admin Arrested in Russia Over Massive Stolen Credential Marketplace
item.description: The alleged administrator of the LeakBase cybercrime forum has been arrested by Russian law enforcement authorities, state media reported Thursday. According to TASS and MVD Media, a news website...

item.title: Roundtables: The Next Era of Space Exploration
item.description: Listen to the session or watch below Whether it’s the race to find life on Mars, the campaign to outsmart killer asteroids, or the quest to make the moon a permanent home to astronauts,...

item.title: Bernie Sanders and AOC propose a ban on data center construction
item.description: Senator Bernie Sanders and Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez introduced companion legislation to halt construction on new data centers until Congress passes comprehensive AI regulation.
